# Security Policy

GitHub auto-discovers this file for the **Report a vulnerability** link.
The canonical security policy lives at [`../SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md).
Please read that document for scope, disclosure timelines, PGP key, and
the self-hosted bug-bounty program.

**Short version:**

- Do **not** open a public issue for a suspected vulnerability.
- Email **`security@knovya.com`**, encrypted with the PGP key in
  [`PGP-PUBLIC-KEY.asc`](../PGP-PUBLIC-KEY.asc).
- We acknowledge within **48 business hours** and commit to
  coordinated disclosure on a **≥90-day** timeline.
- See [`docs/audit-history.md`](../docs/audit-history.md) for the
  public record of resolved findings.
